/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,TextObject.xgde -o /workspace/Binaries/Output/Release_Linux/CppPlatform/Extensions/TextObject.xgde CMakeFiles/TextObject.dir/Extension.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TextObject.dir/JsExtension.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TextObject.dir/TextObject.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/Binaries/Output/Release_Linux /workspace/Binaries/Output/Release_Linux/libGDCore.so
